notes: A-share single-agent run on a degraded path: one tool succeeds, one tool raises inside its handler (failing_tool), and the model still emits a dashboard that flags the missing data in data_limitations with low confidence.

input.task: 分析贵州茅台的投资价值

transcript.content:
部分数据获取失败，基于现有行情数据输出保守仪表盘：
```json
{
  "stock_name": "贵州茅台",
  "sentiment_score": 50,
  "trend_prediction": "数据不足，短期中性",
  "operation_advice": "观望",
  "decision_type": "hold",
  "confidence_level": "低",
  "dashboard": {
    "core_conclusion": {
      "one_sentence": "关键数据缺失，仅凭行情不足以给出方向判断",
      "signal_type": "🟡持有观望",
      "position_advice": {
        "no_position": "暂不介入，等待数据修复",
        "has_position": "持有观察，不加仓"
      }
    },
    "battle_plan": {"support": 98.0, "resistance": 105.0, "stop_loss": 95.0},
    "phase_decision": {
      "phase_context": "部分数据源异常",
      "action_window": "数据恢复后",
      "immediate_action": "暂不操作",
      "watch_conditions": "数据源恢复且趋势确认",
      "next_check_time": "次日开盘",
      "confidence_reason": "仅行情数据可用，趋势与筹码数据缺失",
      "data_limitations": "failing_tool 调用失败，趋势与筹码数据缺失"
    }
  },
  "analysis_summary": "行情正常但辅助数据获取失败，无法完成完整技术面判断，建议观望。",
  "key_points": "现价100.0；数据缺失",
  "risk_warning": "数据不完整，结论可靠性低"
}
```
